setup.title: Set Up Your AI Receptionist

clinicName.title: Your Clinic
clinicName.description: This name will be used by your AI receptionist when greeting callers.
clinicName.label: Clinic / Business Name

voice.title: Voice Selection
voice.description: Choose the voice personality for your AI receptionist
voice.enterClinicName: Please enter your clinic or business name
voice.languageBanner: All voices automatically detect and respond in the caller's language — English, French, Spanish, and 40+ other languages supported.
voice.noVoicesFound: No voices found for this filter
voice.previewError: Failed to play {{name}}. Please try again.

retell-chloe.subtitle: Warm Professional
retell-chloe.description: Warm and professional, perfect for welcoming callers

retell-grace.subtitle: Calm & Caring
retell-grace.description: Calm and caring, puts patients at ease

retell-kate.subtitle: Clear Communicator
retell-kate.description: Clear and articulate, excellent for detailed information

retell-brian.subtitle: Friendly Guide
retell-brian.description: Friendly and reliable, easy to understand

katie-cartesia.subtitle: Friendly Fixer
katie-cartesia.description: Enunciating and professional, ideal for a receptionist

jacqueline-cartesia.subtitle: Reassuring Agent
jacqueline-cartesia.description: Confident and empathic, great for patient support

ariana-cartesia.subtitle: Kind Friend
ariana-cartesia.description: Friendly and approachable with a warm, welcoming tone

kira-cartesia.subtitle: Trusted Confidant
kira-cartesia.description: Emotive and empathetic, builds trust with callers

connie-cartesia.subtitle: Candid Conversationalist
connie-cartesia.description: Natural and cheery, authentic conversational style

blake-cartesia.subtitle: Helpful Agent
blake-cartesia.description: Energetic and engaging, great for customer support

kiefer-cartesia.subtitle: Assured Tone
kiefer-cartesia.description: Confident with strong clarity, composed and professional

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.description: Upload documents to train your AI receptionist
knowledge.cardDescription: Upload documents about your services, hours, policies, and FAQs
knowledge.dropFilesHere: Drop files here or click to upload
knowledge.supportedFormats: Supports PDF, DOC, DOCX, TXT files up to 10MB each
knowledge.voiceNotFound: Voice selection not found. Please go back to step 1.
knowledge.manageDescription: Upload documents to train your AI receptionist. Changes are synced immediately after saving.
knowledge.howItWorks: Your AI receptionist learns from the documents you upload here. The more relevant information you provide, the more accurate and helpful it will be when answering caller questions. Changes take effect immediately after saving.
knowledge.fileFormats: PDF, DOC, DOCX, TXT up to 10MB
knowledge.kbUpdated: Knowledge base updated — {{count}} file(s) synced to AI agent
knowledge.wizardDescription: Upload documents to train your AI receptionist. Organize by category for smarter, more targeted responses.

website.title: Your Website
website.description: Add your website URL — we'll automatically scan and organize your content after deployment
website.scanResult: Scraped {{pages}} pages and created {{documents}} documents across {{categories}} categories
website.autoScanDesc: After you deploy, we'll scan your website, extract content, and use AI to organize it into your knowledge base categories.
website.manualUploadHint: You can also upload additional files manually in the categories below.
website.urlSavedToast: Website URL saved. It will be scanned automatically after deployment.
website.scanStarted: Saved! Scanning your website and training the AI — this may take a few minutes.
website.autoScanOnSave: When you save, we'll scan this website and organize the content into your knowledge base categories.
website.paymentRequired: Add a payment method to enable automatic website scanning.
website.brandingAutoFilled: Auto-filled branding: {{fields}}. Review in Settings → Branding.

categories.clinicInfoDesc: Business hours, location, directions, parking, contact details

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect your practice management system for automated appointment booking
integrations.pmsDescription: Connect your PMS to enable automatic appointment booking, patient lookups, and more
integrations.pmsIntegrationDesc: Connect your existing PMS for seamless appointment booking, patient management, and billing
integrations.pmsAlertRecommended: Recommended: PMS integration provides full patient management, billing, and insurance verification. You can always connect it later if not ready now.
integrations.otherIntegrationsDesc: Additional calendar and scheduling integrations will be available soon
integrations.calendlyDesc: Sync appointments with your Calendly account
integrations.calendarDescConnected: Optional: Add calendar sync for additional backup
integrations.calendarDescNotConnected: Alternative option if you don't have a PMS system
integrations.googleCalendarBasicSync: Sync appointments to your personal calendar
integrations.googleCalendarBasicManagement: Basic appointment management using your Google Calendar
integrations.googleCalendarNote: Note: Google Calendar provides basic appointment scheduling. For full features (patient records, billing, insurance), connect a PMS instead.
integrations.alertOptional: This integration is optional but highly recommended. Your AI receptionist will be able to book appointments, look up patient information, and handle scheduling automatically when connected.

alerts.optionalDesc: You can set up your PMS integration now or skip and set it up later from settings.
alerts.connectedDesc: Your practice management system is connected and ready to sync appointments.

benefits.title: Why Connect Your PMS?
benefits.autoSchedulingDesc: Appointments are added directly to your calendar
benefits.realTimeAvailDesc: AI knows your schedule and books accordingly

phone.title: Phone Integration
phone.description: Connect your phone number to your AI receptionist
phone.chooseMethodDesc: Select how you want to connect your phone number
phone.setupMethod: Complete the setup for your selected method
phone.selectMethod: Please select a phone integration method

sip.name: SIP Trunk
sip.description: Connect your existing PBX system via SIP

forwarded.name: Call Forwarding
forwarded.description: Forward calls from your existing number to our system
pros: Keep full control of your number
forwarded.bestFor: Most clinics — fast setup with full caller ID

ported.name: Port Number
ported.description: Transfer your existing phone number to our system

forwarding.headerDesc: The fastest way to get started. Keep your existing number and forward calls to Parlae when you want AI to answer. Patient caller ID is preserved for automatic lookups.
forwarding.clinicNumberHint: The number patients currently call. You will set up forwarding from this number after deployment.
forwarding.forwardAllDesc: Every incoming call goes to the AI receptionist. You'll provide a dedicated human line for emergencies and transfer requests.
forwarding.noAnswerDesc: Staff answers during office hours. AI picks up when nobody answers or lines are busy. Good for gradual adoption.
forwarding.humanLineDescAll: A direct number where a human can always be reached (office back line, cell phone, etc.). When a caller asks to speak with a human or there's an emergency, the AI will transfer the call here. Must be different from your main number.
forwarding.humanLineDescConditional: A direct office number, cell phone, or back line for emergency transfers and human requests. If not provided, transfers go to your main clinic number.
forwarding.humanLineRequired: A dedicated human line is required when forwarding all calls. The AI needs a separate number to transfer callers to a real person.
forwarding.configSavedDesc: Your forwarding setup has been configured.
forwarding.humanLineInlineHint: A back line, cell phone, or any number staff can answer for emergency and human transfer requests.
forwarding.requiredNudge: Since all calls forward to AI, add a human line so the AI can transfer emergency and human requests.
forwarding.recommendedNudge: Add a human line so the AI can transfer emergency calls to a real person instead of your main line.
forwarding.nextStepsDesc: A Twilio forwarding number will be provisioned when you complete payment and deploy your AI receptionist in the review step.
forwarding.step1: We'll provision a Twilio number and share it with you
forwarding.step2Pre: Set up call forwarding on your carrier from
forwarding.step3: Calls will be handled by your AI receptionist.
forwarding.step3HumanLine: Emergency and human transfer requests will route to your dedicated human line.
forwarding.step3NoHumanLine: Human transfer requests will route to your main clinic number.
forwarding.carrierGuide: How to Set Up Forwarding on Your Carrier
forwarding.carrierGuideDesc: Use the codes below for your carrier. Choose All Calls for full AI coverage, or No-Answer / Busy if staff should answer first.

review.title: Review & Launch
review.description: Review your configuration and launch your AI receptionist
review.addPaymentMethod: Add your payment method to continue
review.reviewBeforeLaunch: Review your configuration before going live
review.configNotFound: Configuration not found. Please start from step 1.
review.voiceMissing: Voice configuration is missing. Please go back to step 1.
review.deployStarted: Deployment started! Setting up your AI receptionist...

live.title: Your AI Receptionist is Live!
live.description: Your AI receptionist has been configured and is ready to answer calls

review.noVoice: No voice selected. Please go back to step 1.
review.noFiles: No files uploaded. You can add files later from settings.
review.noIntegrations: No integrations configured. You can add integrations later from settings.
review.readyToLaunchDesc: Your AI receptionist will be configured with a phone number automatically. You can update settings later from the dashboard.

settings.title: Account Settings

profile.title: Your Profile

profile.passwordAndAuthDescription: Your password and MFA settings are managed through AWS Cognito

team.title: Team Members

team.noMembersDescription: Invite employees to collaborate on managing your AI receptionist
team.pendingInvitationsDescription: Invitations that haven't been accepted yet

branding.infoText: These settings will be used in all appointment confirmation emails sent to your patients. If not provided, default values will be used.
branding.title: Branding Settings
branding.description: Configure your clinic's branding for email communications
branding.logoRecommendation: Recommended: 200x50px PNG with transparent background. Must be publicly accessible URL.
branding.logoLoadError: Failed to load logo. Check the URL.
branding.colorUsage: Used for buttons and highlights in emails
branding.businessNameHint: Your clinic or business name — used in AI greetings and emails
branding.contactEmailHint: Email address patients can use to contact you
branding.contactPhoneHint: Phone number patients can call for changes or questions
branding.previewNote: Your branding will appear in appointment confirmation, cancellation, and reschedule emails sent to patients.

integrationsPage.title: PMS Integrations
integrationsPage.description: Manage your practice management system and calendar connections
integrationsPage.pmsDescription: Connect your practice management system for automated patient and appointment management
integrationsPage.noPmsAlert: Without a PMS connection, appointment scheduling will use Google Calendar as a fallback.
integrationsPage.calendarDescPms: Fallback for scheduling when PMS is unavailable
integrationsPage.disconnectConfirm: Disconnect Google Calendar? Appointments will fall back to PMS only.
integrationsPage.connectFailed: Failed to start Google Calendar connection

phoneSettingsPage.title: Phone Integration
phoneSettingsPage.description: Manage how your phone number connects to your AI receptionist
phoneSettingsPage.portedDescription: Your number is fully transferred to our system
phoneSettingsPage.callForwardingDescription: Calls are forwarded from your existing number
phoneSettingsPage.changeMethodDescription: Switch to a different phone integration method
phoneSettingsPage.changeMethodWarning: Changing your integration method will require reconfiguring your phone setup. Your AI receptionist will be temporarily unavailable during the transition.
phoneSettingsPage.forwardingInstructionsDescription: How to set up forwarding on your carrier
phoneSettingsPage.recommendedSetupDesc: Set up both types for complete coverage. Staff answers during hours. If busy or no answer, calls go to AI. After hours, nobody answers, so AI handles it.
phoneSettingsPage.needHelpDescription: Having issues with your phone integration?

advancedPage.title: Advanced Setup
advancedPage.description: Advanced configuration for AI agent settings
advancedPage.accessDescription: Advanced setup is restricted and only available in exceptional cases. The default configuration is optimized for most use cases and typically does not require modification.
advancedPage.contactAdmin: If you believe you need access to advanced settings, please contact your administrator. They can review your request and enable access if appropriate.
advancedPage.standardNote: Standard setup options available in the main wizard are sufficient for the majority of configurations.
advancedPage.fineTune: Fine-tune your AI agent's behavior and capabilities
advancedPage.warningMessage: These are advanced settings. Changes can significantly affect your AI agent's behavior. Proceed with caution and test thoroughly after making changes.

assistant.title: Assistant Behavior
assistant.description: Configure how your AI assistant starts and ends conversations
assistant.firstMessageHint: The greeting message your agent says when answering a call
assistant.endCallFunctionDesc: Allow AI to end calls when conversation concludes

voice.title: Voice Configuration
voice.stabilityHint: Lower = more variable, Higher = more consistent
voice.similarityHint: Enhances voice clarity and similarity to original

model.title: Language Model
model.description: Configure the AI model and its behavior
model.systemPromptHint: Instructions that guide the AI's behavior throughout conversations
model.temperatureHint: Lower = more focused, Higher = more creative

recording.title: Call Recording & Analysis
recording.description: Configure call recording and post-call analysis
recording.callRecordingDesc: Record all calls for quality assurance and training
recording.postCallAnalysisDesc: Analyze calls using AI for insights and summaries

webhooks.title: Webhook Configuration
webhooks.description: Connect to external services for custom functionality

advancedFeatures.title: Advanced Features
advancedFeatures.description: Additional configuration options for specialized use cases
advancedFeatures.hipaaDesc: Enable enhanced privacy and security features
advancedFeatures.backgroundSoundHint: Add subtle background sound for more natural conversations

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: Irreversible actions that affect your AI agent
dangerZone.deleteAgentDesc: Permanently delete your AI agent and all associated data

advancedPage.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all advanced settings to defaults?

agentOverview.title: AI Agents
agentOverview.changeLimitReached: Number change limit reached. Contact support to change your number.
agentOverview.changeConfirmWarning: This will purchase a new Twilio number and update your agent. Your current number ({{number}}) will be released. ({{remaining}} changes remaining)
agentOverview.changeAnalyticsWarning: Changing your number may affect historical call data in analytics. Calls made to the old number will still be tracked, but any data loss is not recoverable.
agentOverview.reconfigureDesc: Change voice, knowledge base, or phone setup
agentOverview.testCallDesc: Call {{number}} to hear how it sounds

deployedBanner.title: Your AI Receptionist is Live!
deployedBanner.description: Your AI receptionist has been deployed and is ready to answer calls at {{number}}.
deployedBanner.forwardingHint: Complete the call forwarding setup below to start receiving calls.

callForwarding.title: Set Up Call Forwarding
callForwarding.description: Forward your clinic calls to your AI receptionist
callForwarding.forwardTo: Forward your calls to this number:
callForwarding.step1: Pick up your clinic phone and dial the forwarding code below
callForwarding.step3: You should hear a confirmation tone — forwarding is active
callForwarding.step4: Test by calling your clinic number from a different phone
callForwarding.recommendedDesc: Set up both types for complete coverage. Staff answers during hours. If busy or no answer, calls go to AI. After hours, nobody answers, so AI handles it.
callForwarding.voipStep1: Log into your VoIP admin portal
callForwarding.voipStep2: Navigate to Call Routing or Call Forwarding
callForwarding.voipStep4: Set to forward all calls, or configure no-answer/busy rules
callForwarding.voipStep5: Save and test with a call
callForwarding.noAnswerDesc: AI answers when nobody picks up
callForwarding.busyDesc: AI answers when lines are busy
callForwarding.allCallsDesc: Every call goes straight to AI

dashboard.title: Call Analytics
dashboard.noCallsMessage: No calls yet. Your AI agent is ready to answer!
dashboard.attentionDescription: Calls that require follow-up, review, or human intervention

activityLog.pageDescription: Track all actions your AI agent performed in your practice management system or Google Calendar.
activityLog.hipaaDescription: Patient-identifying information is never stored. Use Resource IDs to look up records in your PMS or Google Calendar.
activityLog.defaultDescription: Actions performed by your AI agent
activityLog.searchPlaceholder: Search by resource ID, call ID...

callLogs.pageDescription: Review call records, transcripts, and AI analysis from your AI agent.
callLogs.hipaaNotice: HIPAA Protected: Call records contain PHI. Access is logged for compliance.
callLogs.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone, or email...
callLogs.noRecordsFilterHint: Try adjusting your filters or search term.
callLogs.noRecordsHint: Call records will appear here once your AI agent starts handling calls.

billing.paymentDescription: Manage your payment method and view past invoices
billing.invoicesDescription: View and download your invoices, receipts, and billing history on Stripe.
billing.billingInactiveDesc: Your account is on a complimentary plan during the setup period. Usage-based billing will be activated by your account administrator when ready.
billing.additionalLocationCost: Each additional location is {{percent}}% of your base fee.
billing.featuresDescription: Choose what your AI receptionist handles
billing.setupFeeDesc: A one-time {{amount}} activation fee is charged when you deploy. Monthly billing starts after your first full month.
billing.billingLocked: Usage-based billing will be activated by your administrator. Pricing shown above is an estimate of what your plan would cost.
billing.billingNote: Actual billing is based on usage. Contact your administrator for pricing details.

features.title: AI Receptionist
features.liveMessage: Your AI receptionist is live. {{count}} features enabled.
features.offMessage: Your AI receptionist is turned off. Enable it to start answering calls.
features.featureControlsDesc: Toggle individual features on or off. Changes take effect immediately.

disableDialog.title: Turn off AI Receptionist?
disableDialog.description: This will disable all AI call handling, including inbound answering, outbound campaigns, and automated notifications. Your phone lines will stop being answered by the AI.

toggleOffDialog.title: Disable {{feature}}?
toggleOffDialog.description: Are you sure you want to turn off {{feature}}? This change takes effect immediately.

categories.inboundDesc: AI-powered call answering and appointment scheduling
categories.outboundDesc: Automated outreach campaigns for patient engagement
categories.communicationDesc: Patient notifications via SMS and email
categories.integrationDesc: Connect with external services and calendars

inboundCalls.name: Inbound Calls
inboundCalls.description: AI-powered call answering, patient inquiries, and appointment scheduling.

inboundAiAnswering.name: AI Call Answering
inboundAiAnswering.description: Your AI receptionist answers calls, handles inquiries, and routes conversations 24/7.

inboundAppointmentScheduling.name: Appointment Scheduling
inboundAppointmentScheduling.description: Automatically book, reschedule, and cancel appointments during calls.

outboundCalls.name: Outbound Campaigns
outboundCalls.description: Automated outreach programs for appointment reminders, follow-ups, and patient recall.

outboundPatientCare.name: Patient Care
outboundPatientCare.description: Appointment reminders, follow-up calls, and patient recall campaigns.

outboundFinancial.name: Financial
outboundFinancial.description: Billing reminders, outstanding balance notifications, and payment follow-ups.

outboundAutoApprove.name: Auto-Approve Campaigns
outboundAutoApprove.description: Automatically approve and start new campaigns without manual review.

smsConfirmations.name: SMS Notifications
smsConfirmations.description: Send SMS appointment confirmations and reminders to patients.

emailConfirmations.name: Email Notifications
emailConfirmations.description: Send branded email confirmations for appointments, cancellations, and reschedules.

googleCalendar.name: Google Calendar
googleCalendar.description: Sync appointments with Google Calendar for real-time availability and booking.

pmsIntegration.name: PMS Integration
pmsIntegration.description: Connect your Practice Management System for seamless patient and appointment management.

insuranceVerification.name: Insurance Verification
insuranceVerification.description: Automatically verify patient insurance eligibility and benefits before appointments.

paymentCollection.name: Payment Collection
paymentCollection.description: Collect patient payments and co-pays over the phone or via SMS payment links.

leadManagement.name: Lead Management
leadManagement.description: Capture and manage new patient leads from calls, track conversion rates, and automate follow-ups.

features.wizardRequired: Complete the setup wizard to enable your AI receptionist.
features.outboundPrerequisite: Connect your PMS and add a payment method to enable outbound campaigns.
features.capabilitiesNote: All plans include call logging & analytics, knowledge base with website scraping, customizable AI voice selection, multi-language support (40+ languages), and detailed call transcripts.

outbound.pageDescription: Manage automated outbound calls, campaigns, and patient engagement.

overview.title: Outbound Overview
overview.description: View all outbound campaigns and performance metrics across both agent groups.
overview.enableDescription: Enable agent groups to start automated outbound calling.

patientCare.title: Patient Care
patientCare.description: Manage recall, reminders, follow-ups, no-show re-engagement, and more.
patientCare.noCampaigns: No campaigns yet. Enable Patient Care to auto-generate campaigns from your PMS data.
patientCare.disabledDesc: Enable the Patient Care Agent to automatically generate recall, reminder, follow-up, and other campaigns from your PMS data.

financial.title: Financial
financial.description: Manage payment collection and insurance benefits expiring calls.
financial.noCampaigns: No campaigns yet. Enable Financial Agent to start payment and benefits outreach.
financial.disabledDesc: Enable the Financial Agent to start automated payment collection and insurance benefits expiring outreach.

contactActions.addedToDnc: {{count}} number(s) added to Do Not Call list

toggle.disableDescription: This will stop all {{agent}} campaigns from being generated. Existing active campaigns will continue until they complete.

analytics.title: Outbound Analytics
analytics.description: Track outbound campaign performance, reach rates, and ROI metrics.
analytics.noDataDesc: Enable an outbound agent group to start collecting analytics data.
analytics.roiDesc: Track revenue impact and appointment conversions from outbound campaigns.

pmsRequired.title: PMS Integration Required
pmsRequired.description: Outbound calling requires a connected Practice Management System to access patient data for campaigns. Connect your PMS in the agent setup to get started.

channelPrefs.title: Channel Preferences
channelPrefs.description: Choose how each campaign type reaches your patients — by phone call, SMS, or email.
channelPrefs.comingSoonNote: Phone calls are fully operational. SMS and email channels are rolling out soon.

dnc.title: Do Not Call List
dnc.description: Manage phone numbers that should not receive outbound calls.
dnc.searchPlaceholder: Search by phone number or reason...
dnc.emptyDesc: Numbers added here will be excluded from all outbound campaigns. Numbers can also be auto-added based on call analysis.

callLogs.pageDescription: View call records from your outbound campaigns

actionItems.pageDescription: Calls that need human follow-up, review, or intervention.
actionItems.emptyDescription: When calls need follow-up or review, they will appear here.

outbound.title: Outbound Templates
outbound.description: Manage outbound agent templates, prompts, and deploy configurations across accounts.
outbound.noTemplates: No outbound agent templates found. Create templates in the database to get started.
outbound.bulkUpgradeConfirm: This will re-create Retell agents for all enabled accounts using the latest template. Continue?
outbound.rollbackConfirm: Rollback all accounts to version {{version}}? This uses previously deployed agents from history.
